title: Rodian razor-stick
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:VadonLenitor-AIR.png|thumb|right|250px|A Rodian Razor-Stick]]
'''Rodian Razor-Sticks''' were melee weapons used by [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. They were double-bladed, each blade forming an elongated "S". The handles were attached perpendicularly to the blades. Razor-Sticks were capable of causing extreme blood loss when used.

==Behind the scenes==
The Rodian Razor-Stick bears a resemblance to the ancient [[Wikipedia:India|Indian]] dagger, the [[Wikipedia:Haladie|haladie]].
